block_00: Your proof of address has expired
block_02: Please be informed that your proof of address has expired. This means that you will no longer have access to trade or deposit with us.
block_03: However if you wish to continue trading with us, please upload one of the following documents as proof of residence on your account:
block_04: Utility bill (electricity, phone, water, internet, etc.);
block_05: Bank statement or letter regarding your bank account;
block_06: Tax bill from your tax authority;
block_07: Stamped residence certificate from your municipality.
block_08: The document to be uploaded must show your full name, address, logo or stamp of the company/bank/municipality and the date of issue (not older than 6 months).
block_09: Please provide only full or half page copies of the document (cropped or blurry documents shall not be accepted).
block_10: We appreciate your cooperation in this matter and remain at your disposal.
block_17: is happy to help should you have any questions.
